theorems.name: lean_workbook_10395

theorems.statement: ∀ (x : ℕ) (a : ℕ) (h₀ : 1 < x ∧ 1 < a), x.gcd a ≠ 1 ↔ ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ x ∧ p ∣ a

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_77716
theorems.statement: ∀ (a : ℝ) (b : ℝ) (c : ℝ) (hx : a > 0 ∧ b > 0 ∧ c > 0) (hab : a + b > c) (hbc : b + c > a) (hca : a + c > b), a / (a + b) + b / (b + c) + c / (c + a) < 2

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_78742
theorems.statement: ∀ (x : ℝ) (y : ℝ) (z : ℝ) (hx : 1 < x) (hy : 1 < y) (hz : 1 < z) (h : x * y + y * z + z * x = x * y * z), x / y + y / z + z / x ≥ 3

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_788
theorems.statement: ∀ (a : ℝ) (b : ℝ) (c : ℝ) (hab : a > 0 ∧ b > 0 ∧ c > 0) (habpbcpcageq1 : a * b + b * c + c * a = 1), (a + b + c) ^ 2 * (1 + a * b * c * (a + b + c)) ≥ 4

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_78977
theorems.statement: ∀ (A : Finset ℕ) (hA : A.card = 5), ∃ x y z, x ∈ A ∧ y ∈ A ∧ z ∈ A ∧ 3 ∣ x + y + z

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_80393
theorems.statement: ∀ (x : ℝ) (y : ℝ) (z : ℝ), x ^ 2 + y ^ 2 + z ^ 2 = x * y + y * z + z * x ↔ x = y ∧ y = z ∧ z = x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_8357
theorems.statement: ∀ (E : Type) (g : E → E) (a : E), ∃! f, f 0 = a ∧ ∀ (n : ℕ), f (n + 1) = g (f n)

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_9418
theorems.statement: ∀ (f : ℝ → ℝ) (p : ℝ) (L : ℝ), (∀ ε > 0, ∃ δ > 0, ∀ x ∈ Set.Ioo p δ, |f x - L| < ε) → ∀ ε > 0, ∃ δ > 0, ∀ x ∈ Set.Ioo p δ, |f x| - |L| < ε

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_32839
theorems.statement: ∀ (X : Type u_1) (Y : Type u_2) (f : X → Y), Function.Surjective f ↔ ∀ (y : Y), ∃ x, f x = y

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_80141
theorems.statement: ∀ (X : Type u_1) (Y : Type u_2) (f : X → Y), Function.Surjective f ↔ ∀ (y : Y), ∃ x, f x = y
